caption: A man with glasses and a uniquely styled, tall, grey-white hairstyle sits in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a small bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He has black headphones on his head and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack displaying shirts. To the left and right of the man, red and white logos appear on the screen, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a similar posture and facial expression, slightly shifting his head and moving his mouth as if speaking, while the background and equipment remain static.
